items.typeLine: Resistant Contract: Laboratory of Temporal Chains
enchantMods: Completing a Heist generates 3 additional Reveals
Heist Chests have 25% chance to contain nothing
explicitMods: Players are Cursed with Temporal Chains
items.descrText: Give this Contract to Adiyah in the Rogue Harbour to embark on the Heist.
flavourText: "By all accounts, the Sword of the Inverse Relic was found aged and rusted,
but is becoming less weathered over time. We really must study its properties."

items.name: Oblivion Creed
explicitMods: Totems gain +10% to all Elemental Resistances
12% increased Damage with Two Handed Weapons
items.descrText: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

items.name: Kraken Breath
explicitMods: +15% to Critical Strike Multiplier for Spell Damage
6% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
items.descrText: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

items.typeLine: Notable Small Cluster Jewel of the Squall
enchantMods: Added Small Passive Skills grant: 6% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
explicitMods: Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +5% to Lightning Resistance
1 Added Passive Skill is Replenishing Presence
items.descrText: Place into an allocated Small, Medium or Large Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Added passives do not interact with jewel radiuses. Right click to remove from the Socket.

items.name: Piscator's Vigil
explicitMods: Attacks with this Weapon have 110% increased Elemental Damage
Damage with Weapons Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances
flavourText: "Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer

items.name: Rapture Spark

items.descrText: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

enchantMods: Added Small Passive Skills grant: 6% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills

explicitMods: Stun Threshold is based on Energy Shield instead of Life
flavourText: They will rise and fall in fire and blood.

items.name: Mark of Submission

flavourText: So great was the thaumaturgy of a bloodpriest's mark,
that sacrifices soon welcomed their death.

enchantMods: Heist Targets are always Thieves' Trinkets
items.descrText: Use Intelligence to Reveal additional Wings and Rooms by talking to certain NPCs in the Rogue Harbour. Give this Blueprint to Adiyah to embark on the Grand Heist.

items.name: Malachai's Artifice
explicitMods: +91% to Fire Resistance when Socketed with a Red Gem
+85% to Cold Resistance when Socketed with a Green Gem
+78% to Lightning Resistance when Socketed with a Blue Gem
flavourText: When the wind blows,
Know which way to bend
and watch the others break.

items.name: Spirit Beak
explicitMods: +2% Chance to Block Attack Damage while holding a Shield
items.descrText: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

items.name: Daresso's Salute
explicitMods: 10% increased Movement Speed when on Full Life
60% increased Melee Damage when on Full Life
flavourText: "A bit short in the arm, are you?
Then you'll be short of a head soon enough."
- Daresso the Daring

items.name: Oblivion Heart
items.descrText: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

items.name: Nomic's Storm
explicitMods: 15% increased Damage taken while on Full Energy Shield
20% increased Movement Speed while on Full Energy Shield
flavourText: It takes a clear mind to outrun a storm.

items.name: Void Battery
explicitMods: 25% increased Spell Damage per Power Charge
flavourText: "The trick is to give nothingness,
and to receive everything in return."
- Inquisitor Maligaro

enchantMods: Completing a Heist generates 3 additional Reveals
Heist Chests have 25% chance to contain nothing
items.descrText: Give this Contract to Adiyah in the Rogue Harbour to embark on the Heist.
flavourText: "Trust in scientists to create tools for better drug distillation. They don't know the
worth of the beautiful tools they have. Let's make sure it stays that way."

items.name: The Broken Crown
explicitMods: Socketed Gems are supported by Level 20 Cast on Death
20% increased Damage when on Low Life
flavourText: Every rule has an exception.
